C

Connectable - Interface in Unnamed Package
Represents a device that can connect to a WiFi network.
connectToWiFi() - Method in interface Connectable
 
connectToWiFi() - Method in class SmartLight
Connects the smart light to a WiFi network.

G

getBrand() - Method in class SmartDevice
Returns the brand of the device.
getBrightnessLevel() - Method in class SmartLight
 

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class SmartHomeDeviceManager
Entry point of the program.

S

SmartDevice - Class in Unnamed Package
Represents a generic smart device in a smart home.
SmartDevice(String) - Constructor for class SmartDevice
Creates a SmartDevice with the specified brand.
SmartHomeDeviceManager - Class in Unnamed Package
Demonstrates the Smart Home Device system by creating and interacting with smart devices.
SmartHomeDeviceManager() - Constructor for class SmartHomeDeviceManager
Creates a SmartHomeDeviceManager object.
SmartLight - Class in Unnamed Package
Represents a smart light that can connect to WiFi.
SmartLight(String, int) - Constructor for class SmartLight
Creates a SmartLight with the specified brand and brightness level.

T

togglePower() - Method in class SmartDevice
Toggles the power state of the device between on and off.
